textPlain: Ah I've only recently discovered Oliver Sacks and have just picked up his Letters and Gratitude [1, 2] from the local library!Marginalian also has a great exploration of his letters as well [3]:> I think “the meaning of life” is something we have to formulate for ourselves, we have to determine what has meaning for us… It clearly has to do with love — what and whom and how one can love.[1] https://www.oliversacks.com/oliver-sacks-books/letters[2] https://www.oliversacks.com/oliver-sacks-books/gratitude[3] https://www.themarginalian.org/2024/11/08/oliver-sacks-lette...
